hero.title: Tawfeer Market!
hero.desc1: Enjoy a unique shopping experience combining high quality and real savings for your home budget.
hero.desc2: Download Tawfeer Market app now and enjoy exclusive offers for app users and track your order step by step.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Tawfeer Market is a complete marketplace offering all food and household products at the best prices, with ongoing offers for every family.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: At Tawfeer Market, we provide a complete and easy shopping experience for all your daily needs

allProducts.title: All Products
allProducts.desc: We provide all household needs including food, cleaning, and daily essentials.

delivery.title: Fast Delivery
delivery.desc: We deliver your order quickly and safely to your doorstep.

pricing.title: Best Prices
pricing.desc: High quality products at prices that fit all budgets.

offers.title: Continuous Offers
offers.desc: Daily and weekly discounts on various products all the time.

order.title: Online Ordering
order.desc: Easily order everything you need through website or app.

quality.title: Guaranteed Quality
quality.desc: We carefully select the best products to ensure customer satisfaction.
